acceptance_criteria.text: Users table in SQLite with id, username (unique), password_hash, created_at
Boards table with id, title, user_id (FK → users), created_at; columns table gains board_id (FK → boards); all cascading deletes
POST /api/auth/register — validates username (3-30 chars, alphanum+underscore, unique) and password (min 6), hashes password, returns JWT + user
POST /api/auth/login — authenticates credentials, returns JWT + user; 401 on invalid
GET /api/auth/me — returns current user from JWT; 401 if missing/invalid
Auth middleware protects all /api/* except register/login; JWT in Authorization Bearer header; 401 on invalid/expired
GET /api/boards — lists authenticated user's boards ordered by created_at desc
POST /api/boards — creates board with title, seeds 3 default columns; DELETE /api/boards/:id cascades
Column/card endpoints scoped to /api/boards/:boardId/*; old flat routes removed; board ownership verified
Login/Register UI: centered card, toggle between forms, validation errors, username-taken/wrong-credentials feedback
Board list page: responsive grid of boards, New Board button, delete with confirmation, empty state message, username + logout in header
Board view: existing kanban scoped to selected board, back button/breadcrumb, board title in header
Token stored in localStorage, sent in all API requests, 401 clears token and redirects to login, survives page refresh
